title: Fishing Fillet Knife with Sheath and Floating Handle for Outdoor Sports - 6 Inch
description:
One of the worst things possible on a fishing trip is losing a tool in the water, never to be seen again. The specially designed handle on this knife prevents that by acting as a flotation device for the knife. Never again will you lose your knife to depths of the river, lake or ocean you're fishing on! The ergonomic handle is tailored to fit in either hand with such ease that makes cutting, even in wet situations, easier than other knives. The black sheath will keep it safe when stored away. Don't leave home without the right tools!
